tasks.label: Start emulator, build, install, and launch debug APK
args: set -e; ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/home/eduardo/Android; ADB="$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb"; EMU="$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/emulator/emulator"; export ANDROID_AVD_HOME="${ANDROID_AVD_HOME:-$HOME/.android/avd}"; export GRADLE_USER_HOME="$PWD/.gradle-local"; mkdir -p "$GRADLE_USER_HOME"; if "$ADB" devices | grep -q "^emulator-[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][[:space:]]"; then echo "Using running emulator"; else nohup "$EMU" @test_device -no-window -no-audio -gpu swiftshader_indirect >/tmp/zowi-emulator.log 2>&1 & fi; ./gradlew assembleDebug; "$ADB" wait-for-device; until [[ "$("$ADB" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d \"\r\")" == "1" ]]; do echo "Waiting for Android boot..."; sleep 2; done; until "$ADB" shell service list 2>/dev/null | grep -q "package:"; do echo "Waiting for package manager..."; sleep 2; done; "$ADB" install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk; "$ADB" shell monkey -p com.bq.zowi -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1

tasks.label: Build, install, and launch debug APK (reuse running emulator)
args: set -e; ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/home/eduardo/Android; ADB="$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb"; export GRADLE_USER_HOME="$PWD/.gradle-local"; mkdir -p "$GRADLE_USER_HOME"; ./gradlew assembleDebug; "$ADB" wait-for-device; until [[ "$("$ADB" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d \"\r\")" == "1" ]]; do echo "Waiting for Android boot..."; sleep 2; done; until "$ADB" shell service list 2>/dev/null | grep -q "package:"; do echo "Waiting for package manager..."; sleep 2; done; "$ADB" install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk; "$ADB" shell monkey -p com.bq.zowi -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1

tasks.label: Launch debug APK on test_device
args: set -e; ANDROID_HOME=/home/eduardo/Android; ADB="$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools/adb"; EMU="$ANDROID_HOME/emulator/emulator"; export GRADLE_USER_HOME="$PWD/.gradle-local"; mkdir -p "$GRADLE_USER_HOME"; if ! "$ADB" devices | grep -q "^emulator-[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][[:space:]]"; then nohup "$EMU" @test_device -no-window -no-audio -gpu swiftshader_indirect >/tmp/zowi-emulator.log 2>&1 & fi; ./gradlew assembleDebug; "$ADB" wait-for-device; until [[ "$("$ADB" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d "\r")" == "1" ]]; do echo "Waiting for Android boot..."; sleep 2; done; until "$ADB" shell service list 2>/dev/null | grep -q "package:"; do echo "Waiting for package manager..."; sleep 2; done; "$ADB" install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk; "$ADB" shell monkey -p com.bq.zowi -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
